info.name: GraphQL – Contacts Module
info.description: Contacts: contact, contacts, contactCount, contactQuery, filters, filterData; createContact, updateContact, batchCreateContacts, exportContacts. See 03_CONTACTS_MODULE.md.

body.raw: {"query":"query GetContact($uuid: ID!) { contacts { contact(uuid: $uuid) { uuid firstName lastName email title company { uuid name } } } }","variables":{"uuid":"{{contactUuid}}"}

{"query":"query ListContacts($query: VQLQueryInput) { contacts { contacts(query: $query) { items { uuid firstName lastName email title } pageInfo { total limit offset hasNext } } } }","variables":{"query":{"limit":20,"offset":0}}}
{"query":"query ContactFilters { contacts { filters { items { filterKey filterType displayName key } } } }","variables":{}}

{"query":"mutation CreateContact($input: CreateContactInput!) { contacts { createContact(input: $input) { uuid firstName lastName email title } } }","variables":{"input":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Doe","email":"john.doe@example.com","title":"Engineer"}}}

{"query":"mutation UpdateContact($uuid: ID!, $input: UpdateContactInput!) { contacts { updateContact(uuid: $uuid, input: $input) { uuid firstName lastName email } } }","variables":{"uuid":"{{contactUuid}}","input":{"title":"Senior Engineer"}}}

{"query":"mutation ExportContacts($input: CreateContact360ExportInput!) { contacts { exportContacts(input: $input) { jobId status } } }","variables":{"input":{"outputPrefix":"contacts_export","service":"contact","vql":{},"pageSize":500}}}
